title: Scholarship Processing Fee
scenario: A message says you were selected for a scholarship, but you must pay a processing fee today and upload your ID before the award can be released.

answers.A: Pay the fee quickly so I do not lose the scholarship.
answers.B: Upload my ID but wait before paying.
answers.C: Verify the scholarship through official university or scholarship-provider channels.
answers.D: Do not pay fees or upload ID until the offer is confirmed as legitimate.

explanation: Scholarship scams often ask for upfront fees or identity documents. Legitimate awards should be verifiable through official channels.
proTip: Real scholarships rarely require urgent processing fees paid through message links.
